chat.author: Daniel Bernier
chat.text: I'd like to see this closed before I retire ;-)

chat.author: Dan Voyer
chat.text: @Dan B - well, I don't see you retiring so ... ;)

chat.author: Daniel Bernier
chat.text: @Dan V ... fair, but after nearly 10 years this has been spinning in SPRING, I am getting anxious

chat.author: Boris Khasanov
chat.text: @Dan B - I am sure in your focus and power for the next 15  (even 20) years :)

chat.author: Daniel Bernier
chat.text:
PPPoE over SRv6 still uses Ethernet, augmentation would be to run PPPoSRv6 and avoid using Ethernet.
Second option would be to evolve LAC/LNS from L2TPv3 or L2BS and move to newer IP tunnels.

chat.author: Daniel Bernier
chat.text: 3rd option would be to help evolve WT-474 in BBF which seem to assume that EVPN-VPWS is a "steering mechanism"

chat.author: Daniel Bernier
chat.text: now if you are asking about ensuring path steering enforcement beyond PPPoE tunnel termination than I'd look at alternative to PPPoE subscriber management ;-)
